headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Gilead Sciences (GILD) Expanding Liver And Oncology Drug Footprint
summary: In late May 2026, Gilead Sciences reported new Phase 3 post hoc data showing that Livdelzi produced high, durable reductions in key liver markers for people with primary biliary cholangitis, while also securing accelerated U.S. approval for Hepcludex in chronic hepatitis delta and a positive EU opinion to broaden Trodelvy’s use in metastatic triple-negative breast cancer. These advances highlight how Gilead is consolidating its position in liver disease and oncology by deepening evidence for...
